loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Showing aggregate panel power and per-member breakdowns; supply-side incomers (Solar, Transformer) are dark (no data), so their slots are honest-blank.

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing real-time power distribution across active feeders (UPS-01/02/03, BPDB-01/02, UPS-04); incomers and UPS-05/06 are dark (no live data) and render as blank rows.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: AI narrative is generated from panel aggregate data; per-member narrative details are not available for dark feeders (GIC-01-N9, GIC-02-N1, GIC-15-N10, GIC-15-N11, GIC-02-N6, GIC-02-N7).

loop1.title: Total Feeder Consumption / Supply
loop1.note: Showing total active power — contracted supply (denominator) is unknown for this asset; headroom calculation is unavailable.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing consumption trend for active feeders (UPS-01/02/03, BPDB-01/02, UPS-04); supply incomers and UPS-05/06 are dark (no data) and omitted from the trend.

loop1.title: Quick Stats
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate stats from 5 active feeders; 3 feeders are offline and will render as blanks.
